creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
The secrets.yml must match the data in your database.
Otherwise gitlab cannot access or better decrypt the data.

If you lost your secrets.yml I'm not sure what you can do.

I'm quite sure, you cannot restore the encrpytion keys in any way, that would defeat the idea of encryption.

If you are sure that this is the problem, you can maybe check the gitlab manual what you can do, if you lost your secrets.

Maybe you have a backup with the old secrets.yml?

Maybe it is just a permission problem of the secrets.yml?
 17 -rw-------   1 git  wheel   6250 Feb  2  2018 secrets.yml
